success_criteria: Codex instruction consumer validates and records this instruction without bypassing safety gates.

parameters.summary: Phase 0 stabilisation continuing: TV pilot-10 private staging accepted 19 episodes (Haunted Hotel 5, MobLand 9, The Institute 5) with 9 held; Mission 002 v2 sports discovery PASS with 196 candidates, 40 probes, AFL coverage adequate via 7AFL; no publication or legacy expansion; PAUSE_PUBLICATION preserved; next focus on additive TV adapter request only after local review.
